creator: khigh@scioto.net
text:
When I am using the 4.0 install disks, seems to find all the correct hardware but then errors with panic: ida_wait: incorrect qcb returned.
I booted with the 4.1 install disks and was able to load 4.0, however when I boot the system, I receive the panic: ida_wait: incorrect qcb returned error.

Please help.

thanks

kevin high
khigh@scioto.net

How-To-Repeat: Boot the system
